title: FitMind Test Case Schema
description: JSON Schema for FitMind Agent test cases in JSONL format.

test_id.description: Unique test case identifier. Prefix maps to capability: INT=intent, WPL=workout_plan, WOR=workout_result, BOD=body_status, NUT=nutrition, COR=correction, MUL=multi_intent, MEM=memory, EDG=edge_case.

subcategory.description: The test scenario type for grouping and analysis.

input.description: The raw user message in Chinese (or mixed Chinese/English) to feed to the agent.

expected.description: The expected structured output from the agent.

intent_type.description: The primary intent classification. Must match conversation_logs CHECK constraint values.

intent_bundle.description: For multi-intent inputs: the set of detected intents.

fact_type.description: Type of extracted fact. Examples: planned_exercise, completed_exercise, completed_cardio, sleep, fatigue, stress, soreness, body_weight, mood, meal, supplement, correction, perceived_exertion, energy_level, completion_status.

raw_text.description: The original text span from which this fact was extracted.

normalized_payload.description: The normalized structured representation of this fact.

memory_category.description: Memory category - matches DB CHECK constraints for user_defined_memories and agent_derived_memories.

memory_key.description: Specific key within the category (e.g., goal_type, response_style).

memory_value.description: The value of this memory entry.

memory_keys.description: Expected memory entries extracted from the input.

evaluation_mode.description: exact = all fields must match precisely; fuzzy = semantic equivalence allowed with tolerances; partial = expected facts must be a subset of actual facts.

notes.description: Optional notes explaining the rationale, expected behavior, or special considerations for this test case.

tags.description: Free-form tags for filtering and grouping test cases.
